case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. TUMELO HANGWANI TSHIVHASE RAMAPHOSA ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RAMAPHOSA, TUMELO HANGWANI TSHIVHASE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES SERVED FEB-01-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMAPHOSA, TUMELO HANGWANI TSHIVHASE
DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, THREE DAY NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMAPHOSA, TUMELO HANGWANI TSHIVHASE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 350 UNION STREET, APARTMENT #619, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94133, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT RAMAPHOSA, TUMELO HANGWANI TSHIVHASE DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT RAMAPHOSA, TUMELO HANGWANI TSHIVHASE
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE [$85.95 PER DAY] FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT RAMAPHOSA, TUMELO HANGWANI TSHIVHASE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT RAMAPHOSA, TUMELO HANGWANI TSHIVHASE
